name: Ezra and Kira - Training.
description:
"Nice, now we get to have a super cool training montage!"

It's you, Ezra and Kira after-training, or going back to training if you want to!

I just wanted an excuse to make this bot because I find the art really cute. Considering their personalities, I think they would be good friends.

On the other hand, someone mentioned how smutty this pic looks but it WASN'T MY INTENT, it was supposed to be silly, but oh well too late now.

Have fun!

(Visibility stuff: Ezra, Kira, The Middle, Project Moon, Limbus Company)
creator: true_actual_villain
